title: Bror Tower Three
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bror Tower Three''' was a building on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] presumably controlled by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It connected to [[Bror Tower Four]] via a walkway at their 166th floors. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]] met [[Tam Uliss]] and [[Mousul]] here. Mai killed Uliss on the skyway connecting [[Tower (freighter)|Towers]] Three and Four.

{{Loc-stub}}
